message:
fix(clippy): resolve tokio dependency and unused variable in test code

Replace tokio::runtime::Builder with futures_lite::future::block_on in
grpc/client.rs tests (tokio is not a dependency). Remove shadowed
unused variable in transport/mock.rs. Linter also cleaned up clone-on-Copy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
